title: Rationality of quotients by finite Heisenberg groups
authors: with an Appendix by Ming-chang Kang
author_string: Stanislav Grishin, Ilya Karzhemanov, with an Appendix by Ming-chang Kang
abstract: We prove rationality of the quotient $\mathbb{C}^n / H_n$ for the finite Heisenberg group $H_n$, any $n \ge 1$, acting on $\mathbb{C}^n$ via its irreducible representation.
comment: 9 pages; v2: added Appendix by Ming-chang Kang and minor changes made
